name: Fladle Uberbacken (Swabian Pancakes)
recipeIngredient: 1 Teaspoon Oil Or Butter, To Grease Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pancake batter by blending flour, 2 eggs, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1 cup of milk.
2. Lightly oil a large frypan and cook 6 to 8 pancakes (2 or 3 at a time).
3. Heat the applesauce and stir in the raisins. Divide the sauce between the pancakes and spread over each top.
4. Roll up the pancakes like jelly rolls and cut each in half with a sharp knife.
5. Grease an ovenproof dish with oil or butter; place the pancakes, setting them up on the cut edges.
6. Blend 1 egg with 2 tablespoons sugar, 1/2 teaspoon salt, 1 cup milk, and sliced almonds. Pour over the pancakes.
7. Dot with butter.
8. Place in a preheated oven at 375 degrees F and bake for 40 minutes. Serve immediately.
